title: AEGIS Overview
text: AEGIS provides minimal, reproducible workflow spatial deconvolution audit Seurat objects.

title: AEGIS Overview
code: data("aegis_example", package = "AEGIS")  deconv <- simulate_deconv_results(aegis_example, seed = 123) #> Loading required namespace: SeuratObject obj <- as_aegis(aegis_example, deconv) obj <- audit_basic(obj)  knitr::kable(obj$audit$basic$summary)

code: @Manual{Wu2026AEGIS,   title = {AEGIS: Audit and Evaluate Deconvolution Outputs in Grid-Based Spatial Transcriptomics},   author = {Xinjie Wu},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.1.0},   url = {https://github.com/JamesWu7/AEGIS}, }

title: AEGIS
text: AEGIS: Audit Evaluate deconvolution outputs Grid-based Spatial transcriptomics.  AEGIS R package basic auditing spatial deconvolution outputs Seurat spatial objects, minimal reproducible Human Lymph Node workflow.

title: AEGIS
code: library(AEGIS)  seu <- load_10x_lymphnode() deconv <- simulate_deconv_results(seu) markers <- readRDS(system.file("extdata", "marker_list.rds", package = "AEGIS")) obj <- as_aegis(seu, deconv, markers = markers) obj <- audit_basic(obj) obj <- audit_marker(obj) obj <- audit_spatial(obj) obj <- compare_methods(obj) obj <- compute_consensus(obj)

title: AEGIS
text: Overview tutorial Human lymph node demo Complete tutorial

title: AEGIS
text: load_10x_lymphnode(): load Human Lymph Node 10x spatial dataset Seurat object. simulate_deconv_results(): generate realistic mock method outputs (spot--celltype proportions). as_aegis(): validate inputs create internal aegis S3 object. audit_basic(): compute per-spot per-method basic quality metrics. audit_marker(): quantify marker-expression support method concordance. audit_spatial(): compute neighborhood-based local inconsistency metrics. compare_methods(): summarize cross-method agreement cell type spot. compute_consensus(): aggregate shared cell types derive confidence/stability.

title: AEGIS
text: BibTeX:
code: citation("AEGIS") @Manual{Wu2026AEGIS,   title = {AEGIS: Audit and Evaluate Deconvolution Outputs in Grid-Based Spatial Transcriptomics},   author = {Xinjie Wu},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.1.0},   url = {https://github.com/JamesWu7/AEGIS} }

what: Simulate deconvolution results for a Seurat spatial object — simulate_deconv_results
title: Simulate deconvolution results for a Seurat spatial object — simulate_deconv_results
text: Generates realistic mock spot--celltype proportion matrices multiple methods. intended MVP development demos plugging real deconvolution backends.

title: Simulate deconvolution results for a Seurat spatial object — simulate_deconv_results
code: simulate_deconv_results(   seu,   cell_types = c("B_cell", "T_cell", "NK_cell", "Plasma", "Myeloid", "Endothelial",     "Stromal"),   methods = c("RCTD", "SPOTlight", "cell2location"),   seed = 123,   noise_scale = 0.05 )

title: Simulate deconvolution results for a Seurat spatial object — simulate_deconv_results
text: seu Seurat object. cell_types Character vector cell types. methods Character vector method names. seed Random seed reproducibility. noise_scale Numeric scale method-specific perturbation.

title: Simulate deconvolution results for a Seurat spatial object — simulate_deconv_results
text: named list numeric matrices (spot--celltype proportions).

title: AEGIS 0.1.0
text: Initial MVP release. Added Seurat-first data loading Human Lymph Node 10x Visium assets. Added simulated deconvolution, audit, comparison, plotting, report pipeline. Added example data, vignettes, test coverage core workflow. Updated README enlarged logo, devtools installation, citation text, repository link. Added tutorial expansion, spatial slice example figure, pkgdown/R-CMD-check workflows.
